name: MrAlexTech
oneLine: DaVinci Resolve educator focused on tutorials for editors and colorists.
bio: MrAlexTech (first name Alex) is a YouTube creator dedicated to DaVinci Resolve, Blackmagic Design's editing and color grading suite. His channel runs long playlists of beginner-friendly Resolve tutorials covering the cut and edit pages, Fusion, and color, and he co-hosts The Resolve Creators Podcast. He sells project files, presets and templates through his Ko-fi shop and partners with MotionVFX.
